description: 5G core network vulnerability allowing denial of service attack on AMF network function.
SS7 signaling protocol weakness enabling location tracking and call interception.
IMS authentication flaw allowing attackers to bypass SIP authentication.
Diameter protocol vulnerability causing session hijacking in telecom billing systems.
5G UPF misconfiguration enabling traffic redirection attacks.
SIP protocol buffer overflow leading to denial of service in VoIP networks.
5G network slicing security flaw allowing unauthorized slice access.
Telecom base station firmware vulnerability enabling remote takeover.
LTE signaling attack causing radio network congestion.
SIM authentication vulnerability enabling subscriber impersonation.
